meaning: adj.[天]水星的 n.(假想的)水星人
examples: Mercurian atmosphere is thin enough to be described as an exosphere, meaning the constituent atoms never collide.
He created RACES of alien creatures, such as the Mercurian Harmoniums, a species of paper-thin extra-terrestrials who lived on sound.
It takes the planet only 88 days to whirl around the sun, though, so a Mercurian day lasts about three-quarters of the Mercurian year.
